entity_handle_checks.content: if dxz < pushUpMaxDist and heightDiff > 0.05 and HasTag(bodyHandle, "NPC_ZOMBIE_MODE")  then
if not mainSoundSequential and mainSoundTimer > 0 then mainSoundTimer = mainSoundTimer - 1 end
if HasTag(spawnerBody, "NPC_SPAWNER_POTIONS") and type(potionFiles) == "table" and #potionFiles > 0 then
if HasTag(spawnerBody, "NPC_SPAWNER_WEAPONS") and type(weaponsFiles) == "table" and #weaponsFiles > 0 then
if HasTag(spawnerBody, "NPC_SPAWNER_WEAPONS") and type(weaponsFiles) == "table" and #weaponsFiles > 0 then
if fireAvoidStrength > 0.5 then return true end
if fwd_dot > 0.0 then entry_idx = i; break end
local steer_pt = blend_t > 0.05 and VecLerp(wp, lookahead, blend_t) or wp
if diff >  0.5 then diff = diff - 1.0 end
local crouchIdleW = clamp(AnimCtrl.crouch * (1.0 - AnimCtrl.motionWeight) * (1.0 - (AnimCtrl.smooth_jump_falling > 0 and 1 or 0)), 0.0, 1.0)
local crouchW = clamp(AnimCtrl.motionWeight * AnimCtrl.crouch * (1.0 - (AnimCtrl.smooth_jump_falling > 0 and 1 or 0)), 0.0, 1.0)
if AnimCtrl.turn_weight > 0.5 and grounded then FaceManager:set("Lookl") end
if AnimCtrl.turn_weight > 0.5 and grounded then FaceManager:set("Lookr") end
if WeaponState.gun_aim_mode and target_pos and WeaponState.gun_shoot_cooldown <= 0 and WeaponState.gun_grip_strength > 0.85 then
if #wl > 0 and wl[1] ~= 0 then has_priority_follow = true end
if hit and dist and dist > 0 then
if l > 0 and l < PUSH_RADIUS then
while #stack > 0 and vecFlatDist(stack[1], pos) < tol do
if State.last_path and #State.last_path > 0 and vecFlatDist(State.last_path[1], anchor) > 0.05 then
while #State.last_path > 0 and vecFlatDist(State.last_path[1], pos) < NODE_TOL do
if AnimCtrl.jump_falling > 0.0 then PlayAnimationLoop(State.npc_animator, "jump_loop", AnimCtrl.jump_falling) end
local crouchW = clamp(AnimCtrl.motionWeight * AnimCtrl.crouch * (1.0 - (AnimCtrl.jump_falling > 0 and 1 or 0)), 0.0, 1.0)
if AnimCtrl.turn_weight > 0.5 and grounded then FaceManager:set("Lookl") end
if AnimCtrl.turn_weight > 0.5 and grounded then FaceManager:set("Lookr") end
local query_start = (#State.follow_stack > 0) and State.follow_stack[#State.follow_stack] or pos
if flat_len > 0.001 then pitch_full = -math.deg(math.atan2(dir_full[2], flat_len)) end
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
if WeaponState.gun_aim_mode and target_pos and WeaponState.gun_shoot_cooldown <= 0 and WeaponState.gun_grip_strength > 0.85 then
local query_start = (#mem.path_stack > 0) and mem.path_stack[#mem.path_stack] or pos
if #wl > 0 and wl[1] ~= 0 then has_priority_follow = true end
if pathFailed and #lastPath>0 then DebugCross(lastPath[#lastPath], 1, 0, 0) end
local VEL_SMOOTH_HZ_LOCAL = (VEL_SMOOTH_HZ and VEL_SMOOTH_HZ > 0) and VEL_SMOOTH_HZ or 20
if wf > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "crouch_fwd", overlayCap * animCtrl.crouch * wf) end
if wb > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "crouch_bwd", overlayCap * animCtrl.crouch * wb) end
if wl > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "crouch_l",   overlayCap * animCtrl.crouch * wl) end
if wr > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "crouch_r",   overlayCap * animCtrl.crouch * wr) end
if wf > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_fwd", overlayCap * runBlend * wf) end
if wb > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_bwd", overlayCap * runBlend * wb) end
if wl > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_l",   overlayCap * runBlend * wl) end
if wr > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_r",   overlayCap * runBlend * wr) end
if wfl > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_fwd_l", overlayCap * runBlend * wfl) end
if wfr > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_fwd_r", overlayCap * runBlend * wfr) end
if wbl > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_bwd_l", overlayCap * runBlend * wbl) end
if wbr > 0.001 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_bwd_r", overlayCap * runBlend * wbr) end
if wf > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_fwd", fallWeight * wf) end
if wb > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_bwd", fallWeight * wb) end
if wl > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_l",   fallWeight * wl) end
if wr > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_r",   fallWeight * wr) end
if wfl > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_fwd_l", fallWeight * wfl) end
if wfr > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_fwd_r", fallWeight * wfr) end
if wbl > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_bwd_l", fallWeight * wbl) end
if wbr > 0.01 then PlayAnimationLoop(npc_animator, "run_bwd_r", fallWeight * wbr) end
if animCtrl.turnWeight > 0.5 and grounded then SetFace("Lookl") end
if animCtrl.turnWeight > 0.5 and grounded then SetFace("Lookr") end
